category_sources: source_facts.description says Gerber RS-274X viewer; official gerbv.github.io page describes a free/open-source Gerber viewer for PCB design files.
display_name_sources: Official gerbv.github.io homepage and GitHub README use Gerbv; source_facts.name is gerbv.
docs_sources: Official gerbv.github.io homepage is the user-facing documentation surface; official gerbv.github.io/doc provides libgerbv API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/gerbv/gerbv; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Gerbv pages describe Gerber RS-274X, Excellon drill, CSV pick-and-place, PCB design, and libgerbv support.
